Video.summary: Decorate your walls with handmade butterfly decor!

FaveCrafts: Butterfly DIY Wall Decor

Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Video.summary: Learn how to make a fizzy lavender bath soak.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Fizzy Lavender Homemade Bath Soak Recipe

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Fizzy Lavender Homemade Bath Soak Recipe
FaveCrafts: Fizzy Lavender Homemade Bath Soak Recipe

Video.summary: Subtle spring accents, like this Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower branch, can add some lovely touches to your home. This free flower craft idea shows you how to make small tissue paper flowers and attach them to a branch for a realistic-looking faux flower. Once you create this cute DIY flower craft, you can add them to a vase, hang them on the wall, or combine them with other floral ideas for a unique DIY bouquet. These tissue paper cherry blossoms make excellent springtime decorations!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower
FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Video.summary: Learn how to make a beautiful vintage plate cake stand.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand
FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand

Video.summary: Add just a little hand stitching to your new quilt and sew a cute baby quilt along with Beth.
Video.title: Quilting with Beth: Just a Little Hand Quilting

Image.alt: Quilting with Beth: Just a Little Hand Quilting
Quilting with Beth: Just a Little Hand Quilting

Video.summary: Going on a trip? Need a gift tag? Looking for a cute purse accessory? This Personalized DIY Luggage Tag is the perfect craft that can serve a number of purposes. Not only is this the perfect die cut craft that you can completely personalize and make your own, but you can also complete this craft in less than an hour. If you really need a new luggage tag for a trip but don't want to run to the store and buy one, this craft video can show you how easy it is to make your own!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag
FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag

Video.summary: Here is my review of the DeWalt Tracksaw. As much as I tried to focus solely on the Track saw, it's nearly impossible not to draw comparisons to the Festool TS line of plunge saws. Let me sum it all up by saying you need to be really picky to find distinctions that will make a real difference to the average woodworker.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: DeWalt Tracksaw Review

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: DeWalt Tracksaw Review
The Wood Whisperer: DeWalt Tracksaw Review

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Dancing Ribbons.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 10 - Dancing Ribbons

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 10 - Dancing Ribbons
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 10 - Dancing Ribbons

Video.summary: While picking out the perfect gift for dad can be tempting, sometimes a gift card is an even better idea. As they say, it is the thought that counts! With this Toolbox Fathers Day Craft, you can learn how to make the perfect gift for dad. By creating a DIY craft to keep the gift card tucked into, you give your dad some handmade love and something useful at the same time. Plus, you could easily use this homemade box to wrap up some homemade candies, as well.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
